scope: Provide the following information with the Tender: Manufacturer’s rated performance data for the Chiller offered, Full dimensional details in the form of certified drawings, Weights, including loading diagrams, Details of facilities and services required for the Chiller offered, Details of accessories and features provided with the Chiller offered, Electrical requirements for the Chiller offered, Wiring Diagrams, Evidence of conformance with AS1677.2 and AS1210
The following shall be provided with the Chiller or as part of the pipework modifications to connect the new Chiller into the CHW piping reticulation
Programming of the work and subsequent site management of the work
submit to Council a detailed schedule showing the proposed sequence of work and the durations for which the various areas will need to be available to the Contractor for the work to be completed
Supply and install 7.5kW ABB ACH580 VSD’s to respective circulating pumps for the heat recovery coils
All other associated and necessary electrical works not specifically mentioned above complying to current and applicable electrical codes and safe operation of the systems
Remove and re-instate plantroom external wall louvre for access to equipment delivery and retrieval of redundant equipment
Remove any job generated rubbish and dispose off-site, including redundant equipment

Co-ordinate with centre management and Council officer in charge of the project, including allowing safe access to centre’s miscellaneous stocks they need for centre’s operation and safe movement of the pool staffs through the work area
All other associated works, including controls, builder’s, electrical, hydraulics and other associated works not specifically mentioned in this scope of works to form a complete and operating system
New interconnecting CHW and COW pipework between AHU 1 & 3 and the new Chillers
Associated electrical and interconnecting controls work
Modify and reconfigure the existing electrical system to accommodate the chillers and other associated equipment
Associated builder’s work, making good, removal of redundant items and construction rubbish, etc
All other works not mentioned above to form a complete and operating system similar to the newly refurbished AHU 2
